<!-- source-snippet repo="canton" path="docs-open/target/snippet_json_data/participant/howtos/secure/keys/key_management.json" commit="268d267439898d0927bd547f3d7a30ff469b46aa" snippet="docs-open/target/snippet_json_data/participant/howtos/secure/keys/key_management-1" location="jsonIndex:1-1" -->
```scala
@ myNode.keys.secret.list()
    res2: Seq[com.digitalasset.canton.crypto.admin.grpc.PrivateKeyMetadata] = Vector(
      PrivateKeyMetadata(
        publicKeyWithName = SigningPublicKeyWithName(
          publicKey = SigningPublicKey(
            id = 12207872a327...,
            format = DER-encoded X.509 SubjectPublicKeyInfo,
            keySpec = EC-Curve25519,
            usage = Set(sequencer-auth, proof-of-ownership)
          ),
          name = Some(KeyName(mediator1-sequencer-auth))
    ..
```
